components: loss-gradient as elliptic operator on parameter manifold
analytical index = dim(ker) - dim(coker) of gradient operator
topological-index estimate via Chern character / signature
future_mechanism: During fine-tuning, periodically estimate the analytical index of the loss-gradient operator (via finite-dim approximation: dim(null)-dim(cokernel) on a parameter subspace); a topological-index regularizer penalizes parameter updates that would change the index class, stabilizing the topology of the critical-point set.
